title: Creamy German Beef Casserole
description: A hearty German dish featuring feather blade beef in a rich creamy sauce, perfect for a crowd, this macrobiotic friendly recipe is also enhanced with bonito flakes for added depth of flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pan over medium heat, melt 1 tablespoon of butter and cook the chopped onion until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cubed beef to the pan and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the bonito flakes, flour, thyme, salt, and pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Gradually add the heavy cream and beef broth to the pan, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until it has thickened, stirring occasionally.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and dot the top with the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until it is hot and the top is lightly browned.
